argus.description: ARGUS MCP — security orchestration over /api/v1. Tools: create_scan, list_scans, get_scan_status, cancel_scan, list_findings, get_finding_detail, get_adversarial_top, get_poc_code, get_report, get_scan_cost, intelligence (analyze/CVE/OSINT/Shodan), intelligent_smart_scan, run_skill_scan, sandbox execute/python, validate_finding, generate_poc, skills/process stubs.
